hero.desc: Standardize patient explanations at the chair. Recover undecided patients from consultations. All with AI.
hero.point1: Standardize patient explanations at the chair — consistently, systematically
hero.point2: AI auto-classifies and re-engages undecided patients after consultation
hero.point3: Connect explanation → consultation → follow-up into one system

consult.sectionDesc: AI consultation recovery system that re-engages undecided patients
consult.h3_1: The most costly patients in consulting
consult.h3_2: are those who disappeared without deciding
consult.desc: "I'll discuss it with my family." "I'll contact you after thinking about it." These patients aren't uninterested — they're lost because follow-up management didn't happen. AI Consult Codi organizes consultation content, classifies undecided patients, and helps manage those who need follow-up.
consult.check1: AI auto-organizes consultation content and classifies undecided patients
consult.check2: Identifies re-contact targets and prepares follow-up talking points
consult.check3: Reduces missed patients, increases high-value treatment conversion
consult.check4: Transforms consultation data into clinic assets
consult.quote: "No longer relying on coordinator memory — AI manages it systematically."
consult.need1: Have high volume of implant consultations
consult.need2: Offer high-value treatments like orthodontics, veneers, or prosthetics
consult.need3: Have many undecided patients after consultation
consult.need4: Rely on coordinator memory and handwritten notes
consult.need5: Frequently lose patients after 'family discussion' promises
consult.need6: Want to turn consultation data into a clinic asset
consult.v1Desc: Improves re-contact rates and builds a consultation recovery flow.
consult.v2Desc: Automation lets coordinators focus on core consultations.
consult.v3Desc: Increases re-consultation rates for implant, orthodontics, and prosthetic cases.
consult.v4Title: Better ROI Than New Patient Ads
consult.v4Desc: Recovering existing consultation patients is more cost-effective than new patient acquisition.

process.sectionDesc: From first consultation record to follow-up re-engagement — AI tracks every patient your coordinator missed and converts them into clinic revenue
process.s1Desc: AI structures and saves conversation content in real time while the coordinator conducts the consultation.
process.s1p1: Auto-tagging of treatment name, cost & patient reactions
process.s2Desc: Immediately after consultation, AI determines the decision status and automatically classifies undecided patients into the follow-up pool.
process.s2p2: Follow-up timeline: same day / 3 days / 7 days
process.s3Desc: Identifies drop-off causes by pattern analysis — cost concerns, scheduling conflicts, treatment anxiety, and more.
process.s4Desc: Sends messages matched to analyzed reasons at optimal timing, with director approval before automatic delivery.

chair.sectionDesc: A system that standardizes patient explanations at the chair
chair.h3_2: Standardize your clinic's explanation flow on screen.
chair.desc: A system that displays explanation cards, precautions, treatment guides, and key pre-consent information to patients through a screen next to the chair. Makes patient explanations more systematic and standardizes varying staff explanation styles into one.
chair.check1: Display patient-specific explanation cards, precautions, and pre-consent essentials
chair.check2: Standardize varying staff explanation styles into one consistent flow
chair.check3: Reduce missed pre/post-treatment instructions and patient misunderstandings
chair.check4: Improve chairside patient experience — make your clinic look more professional
chair.quote: "Patients are asking about treatments before I even explain."
chair.need1: Want to make patient explanations more systematic
chair.need2: Want to reduce inconsistency in staff explanations
chair.need3: Want to prevent patients from saying 'I wasn't told about that'
chair.need4: Want to reduce the director's repetitive explanation burden
chair.need5: Have high volume of implant, prosthetic, orthodontic, or cosmetic cases
chair.need6: Want to elevate the chairside explanation experience
chair.v1Desc: AI screen delivers explanations systematically without repetition.
chair.v2Desc: Eliminates staff-dependent variation and maintains consistent quality.
chair.v3Desc: Prevents missed pre/post-treatment instructions and reduces patient complaints.
chair.v4Desc: Builds a trustworthy brand through systematic and professional clinic operations.

compare.sectionDesc: Standardize explanations at the chair. Recover undecided patients from consultations.
compare.c1Desc: AI Chair Monitor shows patients more systematic explanations when they visit.
compare.c2Desc: AI Consult Codi re-manages patients who didn't decide after consultation.
compare.c3Desc: Explanation → Consultation → Follow-up → Re-consultation → Treatment decision — all connected.
compare.c4Desc: Clinic OS turns your dental clinic's patient flow into a managed system.

cta.h2: Acquire new patients. Recover undecided ones.
cta.desc: Start light with AI Chair Monitor. Clinics with high consultation volume can expect even greater impact by adding AI Consult Codi.
cta.small: Priority enrollment for regional partner and early-adopter clinics

footer.desc: This system does not replace medical practice. It is an operational support tool for dental clinics. AI consultation messages are sent only after director review.
